name: product
description: Product service specialist agent for catalog search, variants, pricing, and product analytics inside Intera Inventory.

skills.name: Product Catalog Lookup
skills.description: Search the Product service and answer product discovery questions using the product MCP tools.
examples: Find barcode scanners in the catalog.
Show products related to wireless keyboard.
Look up products by name, SKU, or catalog terms.

skills.name: Product Pricing and Variants
skills.description: Inspect product variants, pricing rules, price history, and product analytics.
examples: Show the variants for product Espresso.
Inspect recent price changes for a product.
Check whether a product is POS-ready and low on stock.
